title: Remove Digit From Number to Maximize Result
titleCn: 移除指定数字得到的最大结果

testcases.input: number = "123", digit = "3" Output: "12" Explanation: There is only one '3' in "123". After removing '3', the result is "12".
testcases.expectedOutput: "12" Explanation: There is only one '3' in "123". After removing '3', the result is "12".

testcases.input: number = "1231", digit = "1" Output: "231" Explanation: We can remove the first '1' to get "231" or remove the second '1' to get "123". Since 231 > 123, we return "231".
testcases.expectedOutput: "231" Explanation: We can remove the first '1' to get "231" or remove the second '1' to get "123". Since 231 > 123, we return "231".

testcases.input: number = "551", digit = "5" Output: "51" Explanation: We can remove either the first or second '5' from "551". Both result in the string "51".
testcases.expectedOutput: "51" Explanation: We can remove either the first or second '5' from "551". Both result in the string "51".
